chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 1028 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.4315/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 16.08.2023 Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, DAG for Pakistan >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhar Awan, Advocate, has filed power as well as statement on behalf of Respondent No.5 and states that petitioner is being paid regular pension, besides encashment amount of Rs.271,560/- and GP Fund amount of Rs.128,454/- have been paid to the petitioner and now there remains only Commutation, which the Counsel for Respondent No.5 undertakes would be paid to the petitioner within a period of two months. Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate, holding brief for Mr. Imtiaz Ali Abbasi, learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of along with listed application in the above terms. Judge Judge ARBROHI
